nodes.title: San Antonio Sports and The PM Group Keep Winning Together
Register Now for the January 25th Charity Texas Poker Tournament – Over $40,000 in Prizes
The PM Group Turns 30: SA YES – Supplying Childhood Success

pageContext.content:
To ensure that children throughout San Antonio are able to stay active and healthy at home, San Antonio Sports created a spin-off of their in-person after school program and created an online resource program called i play! at home. This free online program is available to children and young adults who want lessons to help them practice their favorite sports even when they aren’t able to practice together at school.

 

Now through July 31st, kids in grade kindergarten through 5th can sign up for free to complete 5 online units. Once each athletic unit is complete, they have the opportunity to earn a piece of the San Antonio Sports i play! at home uniform. The first 1,500 elementary students to complete and log their workouts for all 5 sport units will receive a FREE i play! at home uniform. This includes a t-shirt, shorts, backpack, socks and shoes!  Any student after 1,500 will be eligible to earn a t-shirt. A drive-thru pick-up day will be announced soon for a date in early August where all eligible students can collect their program rewards.

 

We are proud to work with such an outstanding organization who has adapted so well to the current pandemic climate and has created ways to keep children in our community active, healthy, and motivated to keep working on their personal skills with i play! at home. Find out more about their program and sign up your elementary students to get involved today.

 

About The PM Group: The PM Group was founded in 1988. For over 33 years, the agency has continued to grow and is San Antonio’s largest marketing and advertising agency. The PM Group’s client roster spans numerous industries including home services, automotive, CPG, entertainment and sports marketing, legal, business services, non-profits, real estate and fitness. For two consecutive years now, the Agency has set annual revenue records with the addition of six new clients and through the continued success of our existing clients. Additionally, the agency hosts their annual Charity Gala that to date has raised millions of dollars for local San Antonio area non-profit organizations in the last 15 years! In 2020 alone, the Agency donated over $1,050,000 to local non-profits. It is our way of giving back to the community that we so humbly serve.
